parents.subject: LU-15367 llite: Add iotrace support for fsync

commit.subject: LU-15367 tests: Add fdatasync support to iotrace script
commit.message:
LU-15367 tests: Add fdatasync support to iotrace script

Add parsing for fdatasync operations to
iotrace_to_multiop.py. ll_fsync already logs both
fsync and fdatasync with a datasync parameter, so
only script changes are needed.

Parse datasync=1 to generate 'Y' command (fdatasync)
instead of 'y' (fsync).

Add test_441b for fdatasync operations.

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Icf14487b00f255842e4eac21e3f108a407489454
